textByHashes.9522d8085ca86d2930009c979bf6191b0337f355: No, no, no! I won't get back to training. Leave me alone!
textByHashes.ea49805eeb541a836c24a86ebe0ad0ac767088e6: Oh, you're not the drill sergeant. Please don't tell her I'm hiding over here.
textByHashes.0ebb29de6da3b1e98790f4f5c1d248e2036a6ef2: When I was growing up, all I ever wanted to be was a fisherman. I wanted to go and live in Port Piscarilius and sail the vast oceans.
textByHashes.d425421966ed03b5e15cf1726f05f5c52312be65: My parents though... they hate the people of Piscarilius. They said I had to become a soldier and bring honour to Shayzien.
textByHashes.b1b6d35dd80ae22b3390454c37c28b6296815c0f: I just can't handle it though. The training is too intense, and my heart's just not in it. That's why I'm out here. I'm not going back until the drill sergeant finishes her session.
textByHashes.5ac417f40a16fd107eadf8e04f7bf130b86be16d: Please, please! I'll do anything. Please don't tell the sergeant! I'll be the laughing stock of the whole kingdom.
textByHashes.9ab1e6f50cc382f51972bc0eb618669106475d71: I don't have that much! I'll give you all I can for you to keep quiet. How is one gold coin?
textByHashes.b96217e59d82230d25ebf613d7d015d01bd77452: That doesn't look solved to me.
textByHashes.67c46dbde02e00709f572fcee229986fa15cb948: Please make yourself some space, I have something for you.
